useWhen: All required closeout checks pass and operator load is sustainable
evidence: Closeout record, learning metrics, no-go review, and approval
publicRule: Proceed status and public-safe learning only
noGo: No deletion or access closeout evidence

useWhen: Useful signal exists but one or more closeout controls remain unresolved
evidence: Named hold actions, owner, due date, and recheck date
noGo: Hold has no owner or review date

useWhen: No-go trigger occurred or the pilot cannot safely continue
evidence: No-go record, deletion/retention proof, and participant closeout
publicRule: No-go status and public-safe reason only

useWhen: Real pilot is not ready, but public fake/sample review remains useful
evidence: Public demo backlog and safety boundary
noGo: Public page implies real intake is open

option: Move official Toastmasters pathway outside package
useWhen: Founder path needs official process outside Governance Commons public files
evidence: Official handoff status stored privately or externally
noGo: Official records stored in public demo

useWhen: Pilot evidence supports a private Decidim environment beyond static public demo
evidence: Hosting, roles, backups, privacy, and migration plan
noGo: Static public demo becomes private system of record

useWhen: Scale requires external Decidim hosting or implementation capacity
evidence: Scope, acceptance, privacy, source code, and handover requirements
noGo: Provider asks for real private pilot data during quote

useWhen: Any wider First Nations use needs authority beyond developer custody
evidence: Authority pathway, consultation scope, and decision rights
Redaction QA and aggregate-only public note
noGo: Identities or private circumstances can be inferred

useWhen: Another organisation or group should operate the next stage
evidence: Ownership, admin, data, and authority transfer record
noGo: Ownership changes without data and access handover

useWhen: Pilot ends or pauses and records need closeout proof
evidence: Archive index, deletion evidence, retention reasons, and review date

useWhen: Learning supports future broader interest but not immediate scale
evidence: New notice, new authority, refreshed support capacity
noGo: Wider EOI opens on old consent and old gates
